steps.action: Kurdish dances (Kurdish: Govend, Dîlan, Dawet, H with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, hold hands, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.
steps.text: Kurdish dances (Kurdish: Govend, Dîlan, Dawet, H with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, hold hands, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.

steps.action: It is a form of a circle dance, with a single or
steps.text: It is a form of a circle dance, with a single or a couple of figure dancers often added to the geometrical center of the dancing circle.

steps.action: At times musicians playing on a drum or a double
steps.text: At times musicians playing on a drum or a double reed wind instrument known as a zurna, accompany the dancers.

steps.action: Often there are dancers twirling handkerchiefs w
steps.text: Often there are dancers twirling handkerchiefs who lead the half-circled group of dancers.

steps.action: The dancers, generally women, but also, on occas
steps.text: The dancers, generally women, but also, on occasions, men, wear traditional Kurdish clothes.

steps.action: The Kurds dance on several occasions such as Kur
steps.text: The Kurds dance on several occasions such as Kurdish festivals, birthdays, New Years, Newroz, marriage, and other ceremonies and the dances have several names which often relate to local names and traditions.

steps.action: Its noteworthy that these folkloric dances are t
steps.text: Its noteworthy that these folkloric dances are typically mixed-gender which distinguishes the Kurds from other neighbouring Muslim populations.

steps.action: On March 3, 2023, Iranian police shut down a spo
steps.text: On March 3, 2023, Iranian police shut down a sports centre over mixed-gender Kurdish dances.
